name: PingIdentity Accounts Deprovisioned on Termination
description: Ensures PingIdentity access is revoked when personnel leave the company
query: SELECT p.id, p.username, p.email, e.termination_date FROM pingidentity_users p JOIN employees e ON LOWER(p.email) = LOWER(e.work_email) WHERE e.status = 'terminated' AND COALESCE(p.enabled, true) = true
remediation: Disable or remove accounts for terminated employees within 24 hours. Automate offboarding workflows where possible.
